title: Montana: Montana Consumer Data Privacy Act (MCDPA) deletion & opt-out
summary: Montana residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising, including through a recognized universal opt-out signal. The MCDPA took effect on October 1, 2024.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
